title: Cocoa Daisy Blog Hop + Giveaway *closed*
excerpt: Cocoa Daisy has done some remodeling and updating, making our home a place you want to be. Drop in and see how our scrapbook home is your scrapbook home too. To help celebrate, we're also offering a couple of promotions…
body:
Cocoa Daisy has done some remodeling and updating, making our home a place you want to be. Drop in and see how our scrapbook home is your scrapbook home too.

To help celebrate, we're also offering a couple of promotions for new subscribers:

1. Sign up for a 6 month kit subscription and you will receive 20% off your first month's kit.

2. Sign up for a 6 month kit AND a 6 month stamp subscription and you will get 20% off your first month's kit and stamps PLUS an exclusive Cocoa Daisy Tote bag.

Here's a simple card I made by putting down strips of washi tape and cutting the ends. It took only a few minutes to make, and can also be replicated using strips of patterned paper.

And we are doing a blog hop with inspiration and giveaways at every stop.

Cocoa Daisy

*****GIVEAWAY***** To win a $10.00 Cocoa Daisy Coupon, simply leave a comment with something you are happy about this weekend. You have until 5pm PST Sunday to enter. PS- Many of us are observing daylight saving time and we're doing "spring forward" later tonight.

THANKS TO EVERYONE WHO PARTICIPATED - THE WINNER IS:

Ellie Augustinsaid...

For me this weekend has been awesome so far- my youngest son had baseball tryouts & I joined the gym! Love the card. Happy weekend to you.
